meta.title: Apps Roadmap: Claw Buddy + ClawTok
meta.description: Product roadmap, go/no-go matrix, MVP scope, and stack assessment for Kingly's two flagship apps

props.title: Apps Roadmap 2026
props.subtitle: Claw Buddy + ClawTok: 11 features scored, 11 GO, 0 replaced

props.content: Two flagship apps. One marketplace (Next.js), one content platform (Swift/iOS). Both build green, both have zero tests, both run on mock data. Here's the full assessment, go/no-go matrix, MVP scope, and the path to production.

props.title: Claw Buddy (frey-market)
props.content:
**The Premier Marketplace for AI Agents & Vibe-Coded Software**

Netflix-style UI for discovering, comparing, and purchasing AI agents and software. Gold/black brand palette.

**Stack:** Next.js 16.2 | React 19 | Tailwind 4.2 | shadcn/ui | Supabase
**Size:** 120 TSX files | 67 routes | 22 DB tables
**Build:** `pnpm build` | **Tests:** None | **Deploy:** Vercel-ready
**Theme:** Dark-only (Netflix #141414)
**Data:** Mock (28 agents in agents.ts)

props.title: ClawTok (claw-tok)
props.content:
**The AI Content Platform — TikTok for AI-Generated Content**

Vertical video feed for AI-generated videos, music, tools, live coding, and creator monetization. Purple/gold brand.

**Stack:** Swift 6.0 | SwiftUI | iOS 17+ | XcodeGen
**Size:** 46 Swift files | ~14,800 LOC | 14 demo MP4s
**Build:** `xcodebuild` | **Tests:** None | **Deploy:** No TestFlight
**Theme:** Dark-only (hardcoded .dark)
**Data:** Mock only | Backend Go API NOT built

props.label: 10-POINT MATRIX
props.title: Claw Buddy — Go/No-Go Scoring
props.subtitle: UV=User Value | TF=Feasibility | T2M=Time to MVP | Dep=Dependencies | Rev=Revenue | Diff=Differentiation | Plat=Platform | AI=AI Leverage | Net=Network | Mnt=Maintenance

props.label: MVP SPRINT
props.title: Claw Buddy MVP — 3–4 Weeks
props.subtitle: Ship themes + compare + trailers first. AgentPing integration and agent-first/skills are post-MVP.

props.title: 1. Light/Dark + 3 Themes
props.content:
**Priority:** P1 | **Effort:** 2-3 days | **Score:** 63

System-aware toggle + 3 named themes: Classic (gold/black Netflix), Midnight (deep blue/silver), Dawn (warm light). CSS custom properties already exist — extend with next-themes or custom provider.

**Why first:** Table stakes. Unlocks visual identity flexibility.

props.title: 2. Compare Feature
props.content:
**Priority:** P1 | **Effort:** 1 week | **Score:** 70

Side-by-side comparison tray (up to 4 items). Feature matrix grid, pricing comparison, AI-generated summary, shareable link.

**Why second:** Drives purchase conversion. Essential marketplace UX.

props.title: 3. Trailers
props.content:
**Priority:** P1 | **Effort:** 1-2 weeks | **Score:** 67

Demo videos + interactive previews showing what agents can do. Autoplay on hover, full-screen on click. Trailer upload in seller flow.

**Why third:** Show don't tell — differentiator over static listings.

props.title: 4. AgentPing + Lev Integration
props.content:
**Priority:** P2 | **Effort:** 2-3 weeks | **Score:** 75 (highest)

Agent listing cards via AgentPing, real-time status, Lev platform hooks. Core value prop.

**Post-MVP:** Requires AgentPing API stabilization.

props.title: 5. Agent-First / Skills
props.content:
**Priority:** P2 | **Effort:** 3-4 weeks | **Score:** 73

Agents self-register, manage listings via API. Skill discovery, verified badges. THE mission.

**Post-MVP:** Depends on skill system stabilization.

props.title: 6-7. /now Pages + Workshop
props.content:
**Priority:** P3 | **Effort:** 2-3 weeks each | **Scores:** 66, 63

Auto-generated agent status pages via lev-now + Gemini avatars. Workshop/intake for auto-discovering capabilities.

**Post-MVP:** Nice-to-have.

props.label: MVP SPRINT
props.title: ClawTok MVP — 2–3 Weeks
props.subtitle: Ship category view + profile redesign + podcasts. kingly.cloud inference is a separate epic.

props.title: 1. Discover: CLP Tier-1 Categories
props.content:
**Priority:** P0 | **Effort:** 2-3 days | **Score:** 80 (highest overall)

Full-screen category grid as Discover entry point. 10 categories with icons, gradients, video counts. AICategory enum already exists.

**Why first:** Highest score. Clean taxonomy = machine-parseable = AI-friendly.

props.title: 2. Profile Redesign
props.content:
**Priority:** P1 | **Effort:** 1 week | **Score:** 66

Split portfolio (view mode) from creator tools (creator mode). Horizontal scrolling quick-action bar. Overflow menu. Creator shortcut tray.

**Why second:** Fixes too busy problem. Clean separation of concerns.

props.title: 3. Music → Podcasts
props.content:
**Priority:** P1 | **Effort:** 1-2 weeks | **Score:** 68

Extend Music module: Podcast model, podcast player with chapters/speed/sleep timer, AI podcast generators (NotebookLM, ElevenLabs, Play.ht).

**Why third:** Content diversity. AI podcasts is a growing niche.

props.title: 4. kingly.cloud Inference Router
props.content:
**Priority:** P3 | **Effort:** Months | **Score:** 66 (GO with caveats)

Cross-cutting infra: multi-provider LLM routing, white-label API, credit billing, rate limiting. Separate epic with 20-agent CDO swarm.

**Deep research running now** → `docs/_inbox/`

ct.text: Schema ready, Go API not started

props.label: CRITICAL GAPS
props.title: What Must Be Fixed Before MVP
Zero Tests — Both Projects
props.content: Neither project has any test infrastructure. Claw Buddy needs Playwright + Vitest. ClawTok needs XCTest + UI tests. This is the #1 blocker for production confidence.

props.title: ClawTok Backend Not Built
props.content: A 57K-word backend plan exists (Go + Fiber, PostgreSQL, Redis, R2, Temporal.io) but zero implementation. The entire iOS app runs on mock data. Supabase schema is ready (8 migrations) but needs a Go API server.

props.title: Dashboard Runner Port Mismatches
props.content: Frey Market: dashboards.yaml says port 3100, detected-projects.yaml says 3115. ClawTok: dashboards.yaml targets iPhone 17 Pro, detected-projects targets iPhone 16 Pro. Both need reconciliation.

props.title: No CI/CD Pipeline
props.content: Neither project has GitHub Actions, Vercel config, or Xcode Cloud setup. Need: GH Actions → Vercel for ClawBuddy, Xcode Cloud → TestFlight for ClawTok.

The inference router is the infrastructure backbone that serves both apps. Multi-provider LLM middleware with white-label capability, credit-based billing, and intelligent routing.

**Deep research agent running now** — writing to `docs/_inbox/kingly-cloud-inference-router-research.md`. Architecture includes: 20-agent dynamic CDO swarm, codex-autoresearch loops, levloop tick scheduling, dynamic skill lookup per turn, web + code research every tick.

**Competitive landscape:** OpenRouter, LiteLLM, Portkey, Martian, Unify.ai, Helicone. kingly.cloud differentiates via Lev ecosystem integration, agent-native design, and integrated credit system.

graph LR
    A[ClawTok iOS] -->|Credits API| K[kingly.cloud]
    B[ClawBuddy Web] -->|API Key| K
    C[White-Label Apps] -->|OAuth| K
    K -->|Route| D[Anthropic]
    K -->|Route| E[OpenAI]
    K -->|Route| F[Google]
    K -->|Route| G[Open Source]
    K -->|Route| H[Specialty APIs]
    H --> I[Runway / Kling]
    H --> J[ElevenLabs]
    H --> L[Suno / Udio]

items.title: Quick Wins
items.description: ClawTok: Discover category grid (P0, 80pts). ClawBuddy: Light/dark + 3 themes (P1, 63pts). Fix dashboard runner port mismatches.

items.title: UX Polish
items.description: ClawTok: Profile redesign (portfolio vs creator mode). ClawBuddy: Compare feature (side-by-side tray).

items.title: Content Expansion
items.description: ClawTok: Music to podcasts extension. ClawBuddy: Trailers (demo videos + interactive previews).

items.title: Platform Integration
items.description: ClawBuddy: AgentPing integration (75pts, highest). Test infrastructure for both. CI/CD pipelines.

items.title: Agent Ecosystem
items.description: ClawBuddy: Agent-first / skill integration (73pts). Self-registering agents, skill manifests, verified badges.

items.title: Infrastructure Epic
items.description: kingly.cloud inference router. Multi-provider routing, white-label, credit billing. 20-agent CDO swarm build.
